combined_text_for_llm: Bill Nighy returns as Johnny Worricker in David Hareâs Emmy-winning spy thriller on BBC Two "Bill Nighy returns as Johnny Worricker in David Hare’s Emmy-winning spy thriller on BBC Two David Hare’s outstanding films and incredible cast are testament to the BBC’s commitment to original British drama and I am excited to welcome him and Bill Nighy back to BBC Two.”Janice Hadlow, Controller, B
